creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 175285
patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates graphics/converseen to 0.9.5.2. This is a minor bugfix release.

From the project's site:

0.9.5.2 – 2016-09-29 – Latest
– Added some generic code fixings

- Q/A
 * portlint -AC OK
 * port test OK
 * poudriere builds for {10.1,10.2,10.3}{i386,amd64}
